task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the OpenMRS login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the OpenMRS or Bahmni login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged in as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS administration dashboard is visible, typically showing the URL path '/openmrs/admin' and various administrative options.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Global Properties or Settings management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Global Properties', 'Settings', or similar is open, displaying a list or table of system configuration properties.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the 'default_locale' property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific property name 'default_locale' is visible on the screen within the list of properties or in an edit form.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'default_locale' property was changed to 'fr' and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value field for 'default_locale' shows 'fr' (instead of 'en') and there is evidence the change was saved, such as a success message ('Saved successfully') or the updated value appearing in the saved properties list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) rather than through a terminal window using curl, database commands, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding UI elements, headers, footers, and menus match the standard OpenMRS/Bahmni administration interface, not a local text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open to artificially modify the DOM text to show 'fr'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The OpenMRS admin interface is located at paths starting with '/openmrs/admin'. The administrator credentials are username: 'superman' and password: 'Admin123'. The target global property to modify is exactly 'default_locale'. The expected new value is the ISO-639-1 code 'fr' (replacing the initial 'en'). Global properties are typically managed at '/openmrs/admin/maintenance/globalProps.form' or a similar settings page.
